title: falcaria agrestis
intro: Falcaria agrestis, also known as wild angelica or wild valerian, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Falcaria agrestis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Falcaria agrestis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
